title: murraya stenocarpa
intro: Murraya stenocarpa, also known as the Orange Jessamine or Lemon-scented Pepper Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Australia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Murraya stenocarpa has been used to promote health and wellbeing, with its benefits including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as a natural antiseptic. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
